creator: paulo@isr.uc.pt
text:
I found that the cat pages  need to be installed for use with the
scilab help. So I have modified once again the port to add this, and
also a simbolic link to xless because scilab expects it to be in the 
scilab/bin dir.

The new port is uploaded as  Scilab-2.2-port-970316.tgz.

Paulo
